caption: A presenter in a light-colored shirt and a colleague in a dark vest stand at the front of a room with red walls, addressing a seated audience. The audience consists of various individuals, mostly viewed from behind, sitting in rows of dark chairs. The room features a projector screen, a ceiling fan, and several framed items on the walls. Across the sequence, the presenters remain at the front, with the person in the vest gesturing with their hand while speaking. The seated audience remains relatively still, though some slight shifts in posture are visible. The text "ORCA" is displayed in white lettering on a dark background in the lower right of the scene. The lighting remains consistent throughout the clip, and the camera angle stays fixed, capturing the interaction between the presenters and the group.
